summary: Completed testing of iteration 21 fixes: (1) Header light green background #D5E8D0 verified, (2) Upload sharing via POST /api/links now works correctly, (3) ShareModal has WhatsApp button with correct data-testid and green color. Fixed missing base64 import in backend that was causing 500 error on upload download.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/links with resource_type='upload' returns 200 with link_code
Backend: GET /api/links/{code} returns upload preview with name, content_type, size
Backend: GET /api/links/{code}/download returns actual file content (after base64 import fix)
Backend: Invalid resource_type still returns 400 error
Frontend: Header has light green background rgb(213, 232, 208) / #D5E8D0
Frontend: ShareModal opens correctly for upload resources
Frontend: ShareModal shows 'UPLOAD' label with correct resource name
Frontend: ShareModal 'Generate Shareable Link' button creates link successfully
Frontend: ShareModal WhatsApp button has data-testid='share-whatsapp-btn'
Frontend: ShareModal WhatsApp button has green background rgb(37, 211, 102) / #25D366
Frontend: ShareModal WhatsApp button text is 'Share via WhatsApp'
Frontend: ShareModal Copy button present with data-testid='share-copy-btn'
Frontend: ShareModal link display input present with data-testid='share-link-output'
Frontend: My Files cards have no button overflow issues
context_for_next_testing_agent: Upload sharing is now fully functional. The base64 import was missing in server.py which caused 500 errors on download. Header color is #D5E8D0 (light green). ShareModal has WhatsApp integration with green button that opens wa.me with pre-filled text.

bug_fix_applied.issue: GET /api/links/{code}/download returning 500 Internal Server Error for upload resources
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: Missing 'import base64' in server.py - the build_download_content function uses base64.b64decode() for upload file_data but base64 module was not imported
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added 'import base64' to the imports section of server.py (line 12)
bug_fix_applied.verification: All 5 pytest tests now pass including download test
